underlying_goal: Execute a 5-phase signal normalization refactoring epic for a FreqTrade trading strategy, including shared signal modules, histogram analysis, frontend updates, and verification of correctness
friction_detail: Edit tool silently failed requiring bash workarounds, normalization was applied before gating breaking oracle detection, and signal module system only covered 20 of 700+ signals (underdelivered).
brief_summary: User asked Claude to execute a 5-phase signal normalization epic with TDD and Trello management; all phases were completed but verification revealed broken histograms and incomplete signal coverage, requiring significant debugging and a followup card.
